title: Tachk@moniy #8461
definition:
Tachmonite = "thou will make me wise"

 1) descriptive designation of Josheb-basshebeth, one of David's
    mighty warriors
nasbUsage:

 1) descriptive designation of Josheb-basshebeth, one of David's
    mighty warriors

    NASB:  a descriptive title for one of Davids men
